---
title: "Skrub"
title-block-banner: true
date: 2025-12-02
subtitle: "Machine learning with dataframes"
author: "Riccardo Cappuzzo"
institute: "Inria P16"
format: 
    revealjs:
        slide-number: c/t
        show-slide-number: all
        preview-links: auto
        embed-resources: false
        transition: slide
        theme: simple
        logo: images/skrub.svg
        css: style.css
        progress: true
        footer: "https://skrub-data.org/skrub-materials/"
incremental: false
params: 
    version: "base"
---

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_introduction-serious.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_productivity.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_skrub_compatibility.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_example_pipeline.md >}}

## The pipeline {background-image="images/pipeline.svg" background-size="auto 90%" background-position="center center" background-repeat="no-repeat"}

{{< include /includes/preparation/_exploring_base.md >}}

{{< include /includes/preparation/_table_report.md >}}

## Step: Drop invalid data --- `Cleaner` {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
<div style="position: relative;">
  <img src="images/pipeline.svg" style="width: 100%; filter: opacity(0.15);" alt="">
  <img src="images/pipeline.svg" style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; clip-path: inset(14% 0% 77% 0%);" alt="">
</div>
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}

Skrub's **`Cleaner`** removes and repairs invalid rows before splitting features from target.

:::
::::

{{< include /includes/preparation/_data_cleaning_base.md >}}

{{< include /includes/preparation/_data_cleaning_skrub.md >}}

## Step: Transformer {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
<div style="position: relative;">
  <img src="images/pipeline.svg" style="width: 100%; filter: opacity(0.15);" alt="">
  <img src="images/pipeline.svg" style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; clip-path: inset(61% 0% 28% 0%);" alt="">
</div>
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}

Encoding dates, scaling numerics, encoding categoricals — all through skrub's column transformers.

:::
::::

{{< include /includes/encoders/_datetimes_base.md >}}

<!-- {{< include /includes/encoders/_periodic_features_base.md >}} -->

{{< include /includes/encoders/_datetimes_skrub.md >}}

<!-- {{< include /includes/encoders/_periodic_features_skrub.md >}} -->

{{< include /includes/encoders/_squashing_scaler.md >}}

{{< include /includes/encoders/_categorical_encoders.md >}}

{{< include /includes/encoders/_table_vectorizer.md >}}

## Column transformations with `ApplyToCols` {.smaller auto-animate="true"}

![](/images/ApplyToCols.png){fig-align="center"}

## Step: Predictor {.smaller}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="35%"}
<div style="position: relative;">
  <img src="images/pipeline.svg" style="width: 100%; filter: opacity(0.15);" alt="">
  <img src="images/pipeline.svg" style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; clip-path: inset(78% 0% 13% 0%);" alt="">
</div>
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}

Assembling the full scikit-learn pipeline with a final estimator.

:::
::::

{{< include /includes/encoders/_tabular_pipeline_short.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_final_pipeline.md >}}


# What if this is not enough? 


{{< include /includes/data_ops/_what_if.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_data_ops_intro.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_data_ops_example.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_learner.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_full_report.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_hpo_short.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_parallel_coordinate_plot.md >}}

{{< include /includes/data_ops/_references.md >}}

# Wrapping up

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_powerpuff.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_getting_involved.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_future_developments.md >}}

{{< include /includes/talk-sections/_tldw.md >}}
